title: PUPPY JOE GIFT — Mom gasps, Joe peeks out
prompt: twinkling fairy lights along the mantel, warm lamp glow. Medium two-shot in the soft warm interior of their first home — cozy apartment with birthday balloons in pastels, small round table with chocolate birthday cake. @young_Mama at the table, hands REACH for a small ribbon-wrapped gift box on the table, fingers SLOWLY UNTIE the satin ribbon, lifts the lid. @puppy_Joe tiny fluffy face POPS UP from inside the box, ears OVERSIZED, eyes BRIGHT, tail wags inside the box. @young_Papa standing behind her right shoulder with adoring proud smile. Mouth GASPS open big, hands COVER her mouth in shock, eyes FILL with tears of joy. young_Mama: "OH MY GOODNESS!" Tiny puppy yip from the box.
